mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patients (name, gender, age, phone, address) SELECT COALESCE(NULLIF(real_name, ''), username), NULL, 0, NULL, NULL FROM users u LEFT JOIN (SELECT name FROM patients) p ON p.name = COALESCE(NULLIF(u.real_name, ''), u.username) WHERE u.role = 'patient' AND p.name IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT id, name, gender, age, phone, address FROM patients
name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO patients (name, gender, age, phone, address) VALUES (#{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{phone}, #{address})
mapper.update: UPDATE patients SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address} WHERE id = #{id}
